project: PRJ02722 - Welltec - Welltec - Kazakhstan - 9886 - Leak_Detection_ SSD (ZeroTime / X-Y)
job: PRJ02722-3 Karachaganak 9886 SSD Position, Leak Detection (Primary Barrier)
comment: Performed Baseline shut in Log for temperature and Noise. Found RSS#3 open. Went down to relog RSS3 and attempted to close. after 2 strokes of trying to close the sleeve we were unable to tractor in hole. Decided to Inject well at 1bbl/min and log from 5535m to 4400m. Then will Shut in well and pooh for fault finding. All read tools still comunicating well.

comment:

comment: Depth kit not sent with loadout from Abz so plan forward is for components required for depth acquisition to be hand-carried to Munich and LL can pick them up from there.

comment: PLT+SNL confirmed. Expected to mobilise 4th June. Awaiting to see what the outcome is with 9886 as to what personnel we can assign.
